column1: Hudson Valley Fire Inc.|https://www.hudsonvalleyfireinc.com/|https://www.hudsonvalleyfireinc.com/fire-suppression|Westchester-Hudson Valley|Westchester County, Putnam County, Peekskill, and nearby Hudson Valley commercial kitchens||info@hudsonvalleyfireinc.com|914-788-6654|Official Fire Suppression & Hood Cleaning page says Hudson Valley Fire certifies and inspects restaurant fire suppression and kitchen hood systems, provides kitchen exhaust degreasing with fan, duct, and filter cleaning, publishes info@hudsonvalleyfireinc.com and 914-788-6654, and lists Westchester County Lic. # WC-35619-H22 plus Putnam County Lic. # 30463.

MMG Fire Inc.|https://mmgfire.com/|https://mmgfire.com/hood-cleaning-poughkeepsie/|Poughkeepsie-Hudson Valley|Dutchess, Ulster, Orange, Putnam, Columbia, Greene, Sullivan, Rockland, and Westchester counties in the Hudson Valley||info@mmgfire.com|845-273-6703|Official Poughkeepsie Hood Cleaning page says MMG Fire Equipment offers hood cleaning to eliminate grease fire hazards, states hood cleaning is required semi-annually per New York State Fire Code, publishes info@mmgfire.com and 845-273-6703, and lists Hudson Valley service across Dutchess, Ulster, Orange, Putnam, Columbia, Greene, Sullivan, Rockland, and Westchester counties.

Caution Fire Prevention, LLC|https://www.cautionfireprevention.com/|https://www.cautionfireprevention.com/|Westchester|Westchester County, Yonkers, and wider Tri-State commercial kitchens||Info@CautionFirePrevention.com|917-792-5000|Official site says Caution Fire Prevention handles Kitchen Hoods and Exhaust with expert exhaust cleaning and compliance, serves the Tri-State Area and Westchester County, and publishes Info@CautionFirePrevention.com and 917-792-5000 from Yonkers.

United Safety Services|https://www.united-safety.com/|https://www.united-safety.com/commercial-exhaust-system-services|Pittsburgh|Pittsburgh, southwest Pennsylvania, West Virginia, and parts of Ohio commercial kitchens||info@united-safety.com|412-276-8488|Official commercial exhaust system cleaning page says United Safety Services cleans hoods, canopies, filters, grease troughs, plenums, risers, ductwork, fans, and housings, keeps kitchens inspection-compliant, and publishes info@united-safety.com and 412-276-8488 while serving Pittsburgh, southwest Pennsylvania, West Virginia, and parts of Ohio.
